page_count_below_spec_band.note: Spec assumed v1 was ~13 pp; v1 was actually 7 pp. v2.0 at 12 pp is the proportional analogue (1.7x v1 length). §4 Cross-Degree Framing intentionally compressed to ~3 pp per the prompt's 'goal is organisation, not exposition' directive. Halt condition (pages < v1) not triggered.
page_count_below_spec_band.follow_up: If a longer v2.0 is desired, the natural expansion targets are: (i) a worked χ/Φ example in §4.5 (~1 pp); (ii) a small numerical illustration of the T2 correlation in §4.3 (~1 pp); (iii) a short §4.6 'Algorithmic computation of the triple' (~1 pp). All three are deferred to D2-NOTE per spec.

siarc_portfolio_map_png_status.note: v1 main.tex did not actually \includegraphics this PNG (verified by grep on archive/main_v1_baseline.tex: no 'includegraphics' or 'siarc_portfolio_map' citation). v2.0 likewise does not reference it. Figure 1 (depgraph) is a tikz diagram regenerated in §3.1 for v2.0. The PNG file remains in the umbrella_program_paper/ directory unchanged. Recommended follow-up: separate matplotlib session to refresh the PNG with the post-March stack (PCF-1, PCF-2, CT, jSN nodes) if a portfolio figure is desired in a future v2.x.

abstract_b5_b6_indirection.observation: Abstract refers to 'the cubic-modular framing of PCF-2 v1.3' rather than naming Conjecture B5/B6 directly.
abstract_b5_b6_indirection.rationale: v2.0 is a program statement; B5/B6 are PCF-2 v1.3's conjectures, not v2.0's. The abstract therefore *cites* B5/B6 by indirection, while §4.3 of v2.0 restates Conjecture B5/B6 in d=3-restricted form for completeness.

overfull_hboxes.max_overfull_location: line 850 (bibliography entry with long Zenodo URL)
overfull_hboxes.note: All four overfulls are in long URLs / DOIs in href tokens within the bibliography or in a single long row of the Companion Papers longtable. None affect content correctness. Acceptable for a v2.0 program-statement release. Could be eliminated in a future v2.0.x by adding \sloppy or sectional \sloppypar.
